programme.title: My Cactus Heart[Live]
programme.desc: Sandy, a newly minted “heartbreaker,” has sworn off love after discovering her father's infidelity. She leaves a trail of heartbreak until fate introduces her to Carlo, her determined best friend who refuses to accept rejection, and Benedict, her charming new co-worker. As both men vie for her affection, Sandy faces her reservations about love, discovering whether her thorny heart can bloom again.

programme.title: E404 - The Missing Magical Instruments / Mr. Banana's Big Puppet Show
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Vicky the Vicuna track down missing magic instruments to save Cloud Kingdom! // Dora rescues Boots' special banana puppet before the Golden Monkeys can get to it!

programme.title: E106 - The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E307 - Learning To Fly / Queen Swiper
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Dulce the Dragon learn to fly so she can reach her parents at Cloudy Caves. // After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.title: E225 - The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: E412 - Princesa Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Pilar the Princess Unicorn and help her get back to Unicorn Land!

programme.title: E209 - Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: E411 - Volleybull! / Diferente Es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: E706 - Scooters
programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig discover how fun scooters are.

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E106 - The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E1203 - Pups Stop A Coconut Catapult / Pups Save Humdinger's Goose
programme.desc: The pups leap into action when Digi and Tal's coconut catapult goes out-of-control and rockets off through the jungle targeting birds and monkeys. // When a baby goose hatches in Humdinger's lair, the little bird mistakes the mayor for his new mama!

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E204 - Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: E218 - Swimming
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are at the swimming pool. Rebecca Rabbit is there too. She and Peppa are very proud of their swimming skills. Everyone is surprised to discover that Daddy Pig is very good at swimming and diving. Very good indeed.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E713 - The Police
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda and Police Officer Squirrel have come to teach Peppa and her friends all about bicycle safety.

programme.title: E714 - Mummy Pig's Book
programme.desc: Mummy Pig has finally finished writing her first book and decides to take it to playgroup to read to the children with unexpected results.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: E1 - Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Something is moving through Germany: machines weighing tons on wheels. In Bavaria, huge mobile cranes lift entire bridges in the middle of motorway traffic. In North Rhine-Westphalia, a heavy transport vehicle rolls through narrow villages. In Augsburg, the steel of a crane bends under 10-ton loads. Crane work with millimetre precision, overcoming obstacles on the route and constant time pressure demand the highest concentration and nerves of steel from the transport experts.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: Amid the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971, a RAW agent enters Pakistan to prove the country's complicity in nuclear weapons. programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Magical Day of Make-Believe!
programme.desc: Get ready for a magical day of make-believe with Baby John & his family! First, Baby John is dressed in shark pajamas & doesn't want to brush his teeth, so Daddy has to make it a fun game! Then, Baby John & Manny pretend to be rival farmers with outlandish animals like tigers & dinosaurs on their farms. The make-believe continues as Jill gets a new mermaid costume & Mom & Dad dress up as pirates to convince her to finally take it off for a bath!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: The families of twin sisters are “infiltrated” by a mysterious triplet, who was separated from them at birth by their adopted mother. She frames one of the twins for murdering the other's husband and then assumes the identity of the widow. Can she succeed?

programme.desc: A single mom is overjoyed when her daughter finally makes friends at her new high school. Soon, however, it becomes clear that this group of students follows their own moral code that's strange, self-centered, and possibly dangerous.

programme.title: E5 - Stratford
programme.desc: Piers and Emma build the first new listed castle in the UK for 100 years, complete with a tower, moat and futuristic tech. It's the biggest ever Grand Design, so is even their £2m budget enough?

programme.title: E4 - Maida Vale And Ormskirk
programme.desc: George returns to a grand Victorian villa in Ormskirk to tackle the giant kitchen and utility area, and visits a Victorian flat in London that has seen better days.

programme.title: E4 - Fish
programme.desc: Award winning chef Jason Atherton continues his journey through Dubai at the beach, where he cooks up some delicious fish and seafood recipes inspired by this beautiful coastal city. He is joined by Chef Akmal Anuar, who heads into the Persian Gulf on a deep-sea fishing trip to catch fresh barracuda for his incredible woodfired recipe.

programme.desc: In a 1920s-themed final, the teams create a dessert trolley adorned with sharing delights and an opulent banquet. Which team will be roaring with joy and be crowned the winner?

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: Dating can be deadly. Violet's dinner with Henry is upended by a series of phone drops presenting a sinister choice: kill her date or lose her child.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years since Jurassic World was destroyed and abandoned, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from an extinction-level volcano eruption.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: An extraction team embarks on a mission to extract prehistoric creatures' DNA that will bring life-saving benefits to humanity.

programme.title: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: A guy and a girl try to keep their relationship strictly physical, but it's not long before they learn that they both want something more.

programme.title: E5 - Mr. Razzles
programme.desc: While Greg deals with his ex-wife's visit to campus, Katie reconnects with Archie, and Dylan thrives in her new role.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: An extraction team embarks on a mission to extract prehistoric creatures' DNA that will bring life-saving benefits to humanity.

programme.title: PGA TOUR 2026 Texas Children's Houston Open -Day 4
NBA 25/26 -Los Angeles Lakers vs Golden State Warriors
NBA 25/26 -Los Angeles Lakers vs Golden State Warriors
All The Long Nights
programme.desc: After a series of mishaps at work caused by her severe pre-menstrual syndrome, Fujisawa lands a new job at an astronomical toy factory, where she meets Yamazoe, a tacit colleague plagued by panic attacks. There the two, whose careers have been derailed by their respective conditions, learn to support and care for each other through life's ups and downs despite their initial friction.

programme.title: Sky on Fire
programme.desc: Five years ago, a fire took the life of Professor Poon, and the notebook on his research for a cancer cure called “super stem cells” disappeared without a trace. His assistant Ko Yuk was escaped death thanks to security guard Chong Tin-po. After losing his wife to cancer several years ago, Tin-po entered “Sky Number One,” a top-level medical facility financed by the tycoons, as a security guard. He hopes that the lab will finally find a cure for cancer, but he realizes that Ko Yuk is the only researcher that is actually trying to develop “super stem cells” to save lives. Meanwhile, her husband, “Sky Number One” president Tong Wing-cheung, is a ruthless businessman who puts money ahead of everything and will take any means necessary to get his way...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Sound Supreme Trio of Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Fish Liew, Jennifer Yu and Peter Chan Charm Man, have been invited to voice over Cantonese version of the animation film “Ne Zha 2”. This episode features these three actors sharing the joys and challenges of the dubbing process. While Fish tells that Cantonese has been a big challenge for her, Jennifer surprisingly wants to gigantify herself when asked which character's magic she would like to acquire and Peter also praises Fish even more! Let's find more fascinating behind-the-scenes stories they are going to share one by one......

programme.title: 77 Heartbreaks
programme.desc: When Adam and Eva break up after ten years, Adam thinks the breach was caused by one trivial incident, but Eva knows she's already forgiven Adam 77 times! Sweethearts since law school, Adam changed professions to start a Thai boxing studio and gradually became indifferent to Eva. Seemingly petty matters, like forgetting she hates raisin cookies, become the catalyst for her moving out and changing her Facebook status to 'single'. Despondent, Adam has a drunken tryst with his student, Mandy. Adam gains new insight after accidentally discovering Eva's private journal. Entitled '77 Heartbreaks', the title refers to the philosophy that 'forgiving someone 7 times isn't enough; 70 x 7 times is too much; so go ahead and forgive 77 times!' Reading it makes Adam realize his love. But what can he do to win her back? And what secret is contained in the journal's torn-out last page? He rushes to Eva and melts her heart by recounting their happy memories. When Eva tells him Heartbreak #77

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Sound Supreme Trio of Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Fish Liew, Jennifer Yu and Peter Chan Charm Man, have been invited to voice over Cantonese version of the animation film “Ne Zha 2”. This episode features these three actors sharing the joys and challenges of the dubbing process. While Fish tells that Cantonese has been a big challenge for her, Jennifer surprisingly wants to gigantify herself when asked which character's magic she would like to acquire and Peter also praises Fish even more! Let's find more fascinating behind-the-scenes stories they are going to share one by one......

programme.title: E2 - Just Set Up The Chairs/Over The Top/Trucker Hall Of Fame/Sandwich Of Death/Portable T
programme.desc: While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: E122 - Let Them Eat Quack
programme.desc: Plucky is named ruler of a kingdom, and the toons visit his castle as he ascends the throne. Before long, Plucky exerts power over his friends, Sweetie tries to overthrow the monarchy, and Hamton lives out his fantasy of the landed gentry.

programme.title: E159 - Booby Trap House/Fish Water
programme.desc: After being left alone at home, Cyborg and Starfire booby trap the tower for safety.

programme.title: E1 - A. A Night at the Katz Motel/Magic Tree of Nowhere/Scuba-Scuba Doo/Conway the Contami
programme.desc: Courage, Muriel and Eustace check into a motel run by a sinister cat named Katz. A very long night is in store for the three, especially after Katz turns loose his spiders.

programme.title: E262 - Players Of The Lost Park/Out To Launch/Battle At Biggie Box/Bon Voyage/Queen Of Bees
programme.desc: When Team Tennyson visits Raspberry Park for some R & R, they get more than they bargained for. What they think are innocent games of chance are a revenge plot by Zombozo to steal the Rustbuggy and rob Team Tennyson!

programme.title: E172 - Man Up 3: The Good, The Bad, And The Manly/Sugar, Spice, And Super Lice/The Buttercup
programme.desc: After Bubbles gets blasted with Man Boy's beard ray, she wreaks havoc in the most manly and adorable way possible.

programme.title: E104 - Tooney Ball Lights
programme.desc: Buster and Sweetie join the Tooney Ball team during Electives Week while Babs and Plucky tackle the basics in Anvils 101, leaving Hamton on a journey to fix his indecisiveness.

programme.title: E29 - Social Media Influenza
programme.desc: When a bad robot named Influenzo controls the minds of people all over Kota Hilir, Amato and friends need to find a way to save them before things get worse.

programme.title: E407 - Fitness Instructor/Trampoline Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes Mr Paliwal’s personal trainer for the day - by making him revamp Mrs Wicket’s garden!

programme.title: E122 - Let Them Eat Quack
programme.desc: Plucky is named ruler of a kingdom, and the toons visit his castle as he ascends the throne. Before long, Plucky exerts power over his friends, Sweetie tries to overthrow the monarchy, and Hamton lives out his fantasy of the landed gentry.

programme.title: E4 - Crowded Islands
programme.desc: On rocky islands off the coast of South Africa, thousands of creatures congregate to breed. Among these, huge colonies of cape gannets dominate. Surrounded by rich waters, they can find enough to feed themselves and their young. But life is full of challenges for the breeding gannets...

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age
programme.desc: If the tiny Nsefu pride is to survive, the teen Misfit and his older brother must quickly perfect their hunting skills. Trek into enemy territory as the lions face dominant rivals and a powerful hyena clan in the search for prey.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds
programme.desc: Go rogue with frigate birds, who steal meals from smaller seabirds; relax in a mongoose-run spa with a grateful warthog; and decode an African elephant’s secret message. Then watch lovelorn capuchin monkeys hurl rocks to attract prospective mates.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E4 - Pirate Birds

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age
programme.desc: If the tiny Nsefu pride is to survive, the teen Misfit and his older brother must quickly perfect their hunting skills. Trek into enemy territory as the lions face dominant rivals and a powerful hyena clan in the search for prey.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E468
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: This refreshing cultural program shares with you the wisdom of life, extracting the truth from social events and casting new lights on the high minds of ancient sages.

programme.title: E131
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. Themes range from hot current affair issues at home and abroad, to diverse topics of social, historical and cultural interests.

programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E3 - Fishing Cats
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the tropical island of Sri Lanka in Southern Asia on a global adventure in search of fishing cats.

programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: E15 - Egg
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'egg' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of eggs - a dippy egg, a fried egg, a gold egg and Dee and a friend even dress up as eggs.

programme.title: E5 - Itchy
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: E21 - Panic At The Pumpkin Patch
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge

programme.title: E17 - Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: E40 - Octopus
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group's new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today's world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E39
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E235 - Plankton Paranoia / Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: E268 - A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E103 - Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and 'correct the record.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: E211 - The App Came Back
programme.desc: Lay Lay's avatar creator visits Sadie with some changes to the app settings, turning Lay Lay's personality negative, while Sadie tries to restore her best friend's positivity and convince the techie not to shut down the app completely.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: E108 - Mikey Takes Charge
programme.desc: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

programme.title: E119 - Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: E503 - Family Bonding
programme.desc: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter

programme.title: E105 - Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: E911 - Hologram Jam / Sick as a Dad
programme.desc: To avoid his responsibilities, Lincoln uses Lisa's hologram device to make it appear like he's doing all of his tasks. // With Mom busy at work, the Loud siblings are tasked with taking care of Dad when he overreacts to getting a cold.

programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: GMA Pinoy Blockbuster: 'Anino Ng Araw'
programme.desc: Fredo (FPJ), a humble man seeking safe haven for his family, flees far into the remote country-side in order to escape the vindictiveness of his crime-lord father-in-law, after wounding his honor by playing part in the death of his first-born son. But no matter where they go, they cannot outrun his desire for revenge. When they are finally found out, FPJ must fight against overwhelming odds to save his wife and newborn child whose fate hangs in the balance.

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: E11 - In Dinard, With Caroline De Benoist
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is in Dinard with designer Caroline de Benoist. On today's menu: skate wing with cider and apple.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E4 - All Fired Up
programme.desc: Paname pays tribute to the Paris firefighters, as well as to fire and flames in all their forms.

programme.title: E20 - Var Special Programme
programme.desc: Hugo Guinet, organic market gardener and chicken farmer, sells his produce direct to consumers. All about truffle-hunting with the truffle grower Philippe de Santis, who offers his precious tubers at the market in Aups. The plant life of the Massif des Maures and underwater biodiversity of the Le Brusc lagoon.

programme.title: E3 - Savoie: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Whether summer or winter, Savoie is always a land of excellence. We meet Fombonne-Rouvier, town planner; Rene and Maxime Meilleur, chefs at a three Michelin-starred restaurant; Klebert Silvestre, bee-keeper, Nicolas Mathieu, crozet-producer and mountain guide; Pascale Vidonne, in charge of heritage in Bourg-Saint-Maurice, notably responsible for its Baroque chapels.

programme.title: E4 - Holding One's Breath With Champion Marine Simonis
programme.desc: At the heart of the Transatlantic Crayer Street Evening event, an evening on Crayer Street, in Ixelles, which turns into an open-air museum. Also: a meeting with freediver Marine Simonis; the celebration of the Wallonia-Brussels Federation in Paris; a 100% Belgian and 100% organic vineyard.

programme.title: E5 - Uru, Tree Of Life
programme.desc: Native to New Guinea, the uru, or breadfruit, accompanied the ancestors of the Polynesians during their long migration. Boiled, roasted, steamed or cooked over a wood fire, it remains a staple food today and is grown in every archipelago.

programme.title: E2 - Summer As The Water Flows
programme.desc: Switzerland is a veritable land of lakes. Whether Lake Lucerne, Lake Sils or Lake Walen, their waters are always refreshing in summer and offer a much-appreciated habitat for man as much as for the plants and animals.

programme.title: Connect with Tech
programme.desc: When rain prevents Darwin and Newts from holding a ‘show and tell' day, they use the Internet to connect with their forest whanau remotely.

programme.title: The Rare Bird
programme.desc: Gabi spots a rare woodpecker. Two members of the Worldwide Expedition Club come to lake Weewannanoh, hoping to see it. Did Gabi really see what she thinks she saw? Gabi is determined to prove that she was right. Can Doki keep the peace on this bird-watching expedition?

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Old Pillow Cover
programme.desc: Yawn! After a good ol nap let's re-use our pillow covers!

programme.title: Fire and Flames
programme.desc: Dry weather caused by climate change has caused a forest fire, and the Black Forest is ablaze. Only the MeteoHeroes can prevent an environmental catastrophe! Pluvia and Nubess are on their way to the North Sea.

programme.title: Reuse Old Photos
programme.desc: The Grimwades decide to reuse some photographs and create their own timeline. The family goes to a local hall, where they can lay out their photos. Mummy surprises them with a large model of planet earth, the place where everyone's story begins.

programme.title: It's Hairy!
programme.desc: Can you lift a car with a ponytail? The doctors put the strength of human hair to the test and find out what makes different colours and types of hair.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: Problem Solvers
programme.desc: The Junior Vets need to find out why Tino, the horse, can't walk properly. They help remove a large lump from the throat of Zoe, the Schnauzer dog. And Pollux, the alpaca, is going bald - can the Junior Vets get to the bottom of the problem?

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: Goukamma - A Last Wild
programme.desc: While exploring the picturesque Garden Route, the Zebrabus stumbles onto a hidden retreat with some of the highest vegetated dunes in South Africa. They face snakes and other reptiles before venturing out to sea in search of sharks.

programme.title: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni look after and re-float a whale that has become stranded in the bay.

programme.title: Old Pillow Cover
programme.desc: Yawn! After a good ol nap let's re-use our pillow covers!

programme.title: The Invisible Theft
programme.desc: Cleopatra uses invisibility paint to catch the superhero Sprinter, but she forgets that he can still use his superpower even if his head is invisible.

programme.title: Ebb and the Bike
programme.desc: Flo has a new bike and seems to prefer the bike to Ebb and Bird. But Ebb is wrong. Flo has found an Ebb sized basket to fit on the front of her bike. And there's room behind for Bird too. Now all three can ride together. Nothing Can Stop Them Now!

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Magnificent Mucus
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the power of mighty mucus in keeping bacteria and air particles out of your airways. In the emergency department, Maisie has a bead stuck up her nose!

programme.title: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets have to look after squealing piglets, get uncomfortably close to a giant horse that is having an internal examination, and do health checks on tiny homeless kittens.

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: To Love Ferrari
programme.desc: Just like many young girl, Vivian always dream of having a Ferrari and being a popular singer. One day, she runs into her childhood friend Seiko and meets Seiko's boy friend Bill and Bill's friend Columbus. Bill falls in love with Vivian at first sight, and Columbus promises to arrange an audition for Vivian. Everything seems fine and Vivian is one step away from her dream. But right at this moment, Vivian losses her eyesight and is abducted by some drug dealer at the same time. Is Vivian going to make her dream come true? Or is there a shattered dream waiting for her?

programme.title: Operation Scorpio
programme.desc: Fei comes to Hong Kong with his son Yushu and winds up a back-alley barber. Yushu is now in high school but he only likes to draw pictures. He also is hot blooded, thus often getting into fights. By accident, Yushu meets beautiful Ru. He learns that Inspector Hua and underworld boss Wang are working together in prostitution and human traffic. Yushu helps Ru to escape from Wang 's catches. Fei, Yushu and Ru are being haunted by Hua's men, but are saved by self-styled kungfu master Jean-Paul. They are taken in by Master Yi and asks Yushu to prepare the beef noodles but he only wants to learn kungfu from Jean-Paul. However, Yushu realizes Master Yi actually is the kungfu master. He begs Master Yi to teach him the skills and fight against evil forces together...

programme.title: I Want to Go On Living
programme.desc: Bei Yan and Wen Zixiang grew up together and were meant to be a pair. However, Yan needed money for her grandmother who was very sick. So she married a well-to-do man in England. She had to run the restaurant for her husband and took care of their disabled daughter Ye Fan. Yet her impotent husband often abused her...

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

E1287
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E5

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E1 - 素人嘉賓初相見
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

E5 - Mr. Razzles

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.
